# Balanced forces keep motion

## Short Teaching Summary
Balanced forces keep motion: If forces are balanced and an object is at rest, it remains at rest. Key detail: If forces are balanced and an object is moving at a constant speed in a straight line, it continues to move at the same speed in the same straight line. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

## Best Examples
- If forces are balanced and an object is at rest, it remains at rest.
- If forces are balanced and an object is moving at a constant speed in a straight line, it continues to move at the same speed in the same straight line.
